< Home >

POST restapi/personal/assignments/{elementId}/answers/v1

Submit answer for an assignment, only to be used by students.

Request Information

URI Parameters

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
elementId

The elementId for the assignment, unique in scope of a customer.

 integer

Required

Body Parameters

Model for the answer

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Assignment.Requests.SubmitAnswerRequest
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Text

Text for the answer, which may contain HTML.

 string

None.
Files

A collection of files that are uploaded as part of the answer, temp files uploaded using the .

 Collection of Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.FileUpload.UploadedTempFile

None.

Request Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "Text": "sample string 1",
  "Files": [
    {
      "FileRepoId": "sample string 1",
      "SignedFileRepoId": "sample string 2",
      "Name": "sample string 3",
      "MimeType": "sample string 4"
    },
    {
      "FileRepoId": "sample string 1",
      "SignedFileRepoId": "sample string 2",
      "Name": "sample string 3",
      "MimeType": "sample string 4"
    }
  ]
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<SubmitAnswerRequest xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Assignment.Requests">
  <Files xmlns:d2p1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.FileUpload">
    <d2p1:UploadedTempFile>
      <d2p1:FileRepoId>sample string 1</d2p1:FileRepoId>
      <d2p1:MimeType>sample string 4</d2p1:MimeType>
      <d2p1:Name>sample string 3</d2p1:Name>
      <d2p1:SignedFileRepoId>sample string 2</d2p1:SignedFileRepoId>
    </d2p1:UploadedTempFile>
    <d2p1:UploadedTempFile>
      <d2p1:FileRepoId>sample string 1</d2p1:FileRepoId>
      <d2p1:MimeType>sample string 4</d2p1:MimeType>
      <d2p1:Name>sample string 3</d2p1:Name>
      <d2p1:SignedFileRepoId>sample string 2</d2p1:SignedFileRepoId>
    </d2p1:UploadedTempFile>
  </Files>
  <Text>sample string 1</Text>
</SubmitAnswerRequest>

application/x-www-form-urlencoded

Sample: 
No sample available

Response Information

Resource Description

Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Assignment.Responses.SubmitAnswerResponse
NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
AnswerId

The id for the answer.

 integer

None.

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
{
  "AnswerId": 1
}

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<SubmitAnswerResponse xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Assignment.Responses">
  <AnswerId>1</AnswerId>
</SubmitAnswerResponse>
